task_completion.description: Verify that Developer Mode is enabled in Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the bug icon in the top right corner of the Odoo top navigation bar, which indicates Developer Mode is active.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a new Activity Type named 'Product Demo'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Activity Type form or list view where the 'Name' field is filled with exactly 'Product Demo'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Default Summary is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Default Summary' field in the Activity Type form containing the text 'Scheduled product demonstration'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Default Note is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Default Note' rich text area or field containing the text 'Please prepare the demo environment and confirm attendee list before the session.'

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Planned in' delay is set to 3 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Planned in' or delay configuration field showing the number '3' with 'days' selected in the adjacent dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify the activity type is constrained to the Lead/Opportunity model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Model' or 'Constrain to Model' field showing 'Lead/Opportunity' or 'crm.lead' selected.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web GUI to create the activity type.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web interface being interacted with, not a terminal, python script, or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction is within the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should display standard Odoo 17 CRM/Settings UI elements, menus, and styling, rather than a generic text editor or mock webpage.

integrity.description: Verify the record is being properly entered into the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs should be visible within the standard Odoo 'Activity Types' form view, indicating a genuine attempt to save the configuration in the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Activity Name: 'Product Demo'. Expected Default Summary: 'Scheduled product demonstration'. Expected Default Note must contain: 'prepare the demo environment'. Expected Planned in delay: 3 days. Expected Model constraint: 'Lead/Opportunity' (crm.lead). Developer mode is indicated by a bug icon in the Odoo top navbar.
